title: test_user_authentication_login_success
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in with valid email and password credentials using the supabase.auth.signInWithPassword API endpoint and is redirected to the client panel.

title: test_user_authentication_login_failure
description: Verify that attempting to log in with invalid credentials using the supabase.auth.signInWithPassword API endpoint results in an 'Invalid credentials' error message.

title: test_user_registration_success
description: Verify that a new user can register successfully with valid information using the supabase.auth.signUp API endpoint and receives an email verification confirmation.

title: test_user_registration_password_strength_validation
description: Verify that registration fails with a 'Password too weak' validation error when a weak password is submitted to the supabase.auth.signUp API endpoint.

title: test_password_reset_success
description: Verify that a password reset link is sent successfully when a registered email is submitted to the supabase.auth.resetPasswordForEmail API endpoint.

title: test_password_reset_unregistered_email
description: Verify that submitting an unregistered email to the supabase.auth.resetPasswordForEmail API endpoint results in an 'Email not found' error message.

title: test_appointment_booking_success
description: Verify that a user can successfully book an appointment by submitting date, time, and contact information which inserts a new record into the appointments table via supabase.from('appointments').insert API endpoint.

title: test_appointment_booking_time_slot_unavailable
description: Verify that attempting to book an appointment for a time slot that is already booked results in a 'time slot unavailable' error message and no new record is inserted into the appointments table.

title: test_admin_dashboard_blog_post_creation
description: Verify that an authenticated admin user can create a new blog post using the supabase.from('blog_posts').insert API endpoint and the new post appears in the BlogTab.

title: test_client_panel_appointment_view
description: Verify that an authenticated client can view their upcoming appointments fetched from the appointments table using supabase.from('appointments').select API endpoint in the client panel.
